Signed by **Alejandro Miguel Nardea, Gerente General**. Interpretation: standard post-construction intra-group capital return; plant was built 2018–2020, excess capitalisation returned to parent.

**Ownership chain:**

```
Cartocor de Peru S.A. (PE)
  → Cartocor S.A. (AR) — Arcor Group packaging division
    → Arcor S.A.I.C. (AR) — founded 1951, Arroyito, Córdoba
      → Pagani family (Luis Pagani, Chairman/CEO) + co-founders
        (Brizio, Mujica, Seveso, Funes families)
```

Arcor Group: ~USD 4B revenue, 39 industrial plants across Latin America, 100+ countries, world's largest hard candy manufacturer.

⚠️ **Victor Manuel Arce as UBO:** No public record connects this name to Cartocor de Peru or Arcor Group. Could be a local nominee shareholder or SUNARP-registered director not visible in open sources. **SUNARP partida electrónica required for confirmation.**
